title: NIMASA DG -Jamoh at The book launch of Governor El-Rufai
description: The Director General NIMASA, Dr. Bashir Jamoh, OFR today commended the Governor of Kaduna State Malam Nasir El Rufai for the people oriented projects executed during his tenure as Kaduna State Governo
html:
The Director General NIMASA, Dr. Bashir Jamoh, OFR today commended the Governor of Kaduna State Malam Nasir El Rufai for the people oriented projects executed during his tenure as Kaduna State Governor.

Dr Jamoh stated this during the Public Presentation of a book titled “Putting The People First: The El-rufai Years” By Emmanuel Ado which was presented to the public today at the Umaru Musa Yar’adua Conference Centre in Kaduna today.

He urged indigenes of the State to extend cooperation to the incoming Administration of Governor Elect Uba Sanni to ensure a consolidation on the gains of the El Rufai years.

Dignitaries who graced the occasion included Governor Nyesom Wike of Rivers State , Emir of Zauzau, Ahmed Nuhu Bamako, and Kaduna State Governor Elect, Uba Sani amongst others.
